microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **resilience validation platform** from a 2-person operation into a self-service, fully platformized system — standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **zero-to-one development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and shifted execution to a scalable, customer-ready deployment model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model for enterprise workloads.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as **bridge lead** for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring airtight distributed-systems coordination.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring end-to-end workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39%, increase drill capacity by 21%, and demonstrate a repeatable pattern for deploying LLM-powered tooling into real operational workflows.

Translated real-world customer failure patterns into foundational platform improvements, feeding insights from live drill executions directly into product roadmap decisions and shaping how forward-deployed resilience engineering operates at Azure scale.

Owned full project lifecycle — idea to architecture to shipping to iteration — partnering across engineering, operations, and enterprise customer teams to prototype, validate, and scale solutions in high-ambiguity, high-agency environments.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-powered code generation** adoption across Azure, running hands-on customer demos and workflow integrations that drove utilization across 14 key engineering teams and freed **37 engineering hours monthly** for higher-leverage product work.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating real usage patterns into actionable platform improvements.

Accelerated AI-assisted developer workflows by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to a **semantic search tool**, cutting lookup time by 83% and laying the groundwork for scalable LLM-powered knowledge retrieval across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and cut region launch time by 28% by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework — coordinating across 140+ teams to ship a foundational platform capability end-to-end.

Drove product strategy to eliminate launch toil by conducting discovery with 20+ service teams, identifying **81 hours of manual effort** per region, and building a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths and scale self-service execution.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to pinpoint automation gaps, prioritize high-impact investments, and build a data-driven case for platform-level infrastructure improvements.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the full legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional deployment in a live warehouse environment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies across sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process — keeping the deployment cycle on track under tight operational constraints.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable deployment playbook for future large-scale rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, designing and rolling out a new CRM process that improved conversion rate and reduced proposal turnaround time.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — overhauling the website and Google profile to better surface the product to high-intent customers.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks and delivering a data-backed model to guide future customer scoping and proposal strategy.

'deploy intelligence into the real world' / 'forward-deployed' framing (JD: 'Deploy intelligence into the real world') reflected in microsoft_ft bullet#6 and bullet#7 using 'forward-deployed resilience engineering' and 'deploying LLM-powered tooling into real operational workflows.'

'real usage patterns into foundational platform improvements' (JD: 'Translate insights from real usage into foundational platform improvements') directly mirrored in microsoft_ft bullet#6 and microsoft_2023 bullet#2.
